title: Figma meets hardware: prototyping for the physical world
speakers: Frederik Ueberschär (Senior Designer for Creative Technology, Electrolux), Sam Thorne (Senior Principal Designer for Creative Technology, Electrolux)
key_points: Electrolux uses Figma to design the next generation of home appliances, and this talk shares how the team bridged the digital-physical gap to extend Figma's canvas into the physical world.
The team built "Figma Displays" using off-the-shelf electronics that live-stream prototypes onto production-accurate screens.
This new process shrank the feedback loop from six months to just two minutes, completely revamping the workflow.
The talk aims to inspire attendees to find their own ways to connect the digital canvas to the physical world around them.
